title: Defilement
description: A extension mod for defile , for better crafting
body:
# Defilement
## an extension mod for defile and undefile for better crafting recipe
# Features
## Items / Blocks
- Embercore
     > A mysterious and volatile core, essential for the creation of celestial artifacts. This item is used to alter the crafting recipe of the Sun Effigy, changing its properties.

- Lumin Essence
     > A glowing and radiant essence that holds the power of the sun itself. Used to modify the Sun   Staff crafting recipe, making it more potent.

- Eclipse Fragment
     > A rare fragment that captures the essence of a solar eclipse. This item is critical in crafting the Sun Effigy and has the power to alter the world around it when combined with Embercore.

![Items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/081d24aa4cb856b5f8ea50e83c151e3b42278b1e.png)


## Crafting Changes
- Sun Effigy
     > Originally crafted with gold blocks and a sunflower, now reimagined with Embercore and Eclipse Fragments. The Sun Effigy channels the sun’s power, allowing you to eclipse the sun itself when used in special crafting rituals.

- Sun Staff
     > Once crafted with simple materials, now enhanced by Lumin Essence. The Sun Staff becomes an even more powerful tool for manipulating the sun’s light and controlling celestial events.
  
## New Crafting Recipes :
  
- Sun Effigy: Crafted using Embercore and Eclipse Fragment in place of traditional ingredients.
- Sun Staff: Lumin Essence replaces the former components, giving the Sun Staff greater power and abilities.

![Recipes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3f88f61803f71bbff1e4fb51ff6ed57eec3ad323.png)
